css.preheaderContent: color:#808080; font-family:"Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; font-size:10px; line-height:125%; text-align:left;
css.headerContent: color:#505050; font-family:"Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; font-size:20px; font-weight:bold; line-height:100%; padding-top:0; padding-right:0; padding-bottom:0; padding-left:0; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle;
css.imageContent: font-family:Helvetica; font-size:20px; font-weight:bold; line-height:100%; padding-top:0; padding-right:0; padding-bottom:0; padding-left:0; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle;
css.bodyContent: color:#333; font-family:"Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; font-size:15px; line-height:150%; padding-top:20px; padding-right:40px; padding-bottom:0; padding-left:40px; text-align:left;
css.h1: color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:"Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; font-size:22px; font-style:normal; font-weight:normal; line-height:1.4em; letter-spacing:normal; margin-top:10px; margin-right:0; margin-bottom:0; margin-left:0; text-align:left;
css.h2: color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:"Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; font-size:20px; font-style:normal; font-weight:normal; line-height:100%; letter-spacing:normal; margin-top:0; margin-right:0; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0; text-align:left;
css.h3: color:#555 !important; display:block; font-family:"Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:normal; line-height:100%; letter-spacing:normal; margin-top:0; margin-right:0; margin-bottom:15px; margin-left:0; text-align:left;
css.h4: color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:"Helvetica Neue",Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:normal; line-height:100%; letter-spacing:normal; margin-top:0; margin-right:0; margin-bottom:25px; margin-left:0; text-align:left;
